title: Historical Token Holdings
description: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — returns historical balance and price data per token using getHistoricalTokenBalancesForWalletAddress. Foundational chains only.
useCase: Reconstruct a wallet's exact token holdings at any past date — essential for tax calculations, historical P&L reports, and portfolio audits.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
